title: Privacy Policy
metaDescription: Dropp collects no data: everything stays on your iPhone and Apple Watch. No account, no server, no analytics.
lead: Dropp collects no data. None. Everything you enter stays on your device, and we have no technical means of accessing it.
s1P1: The infusions you track (volume, duration, computed rate, optional place label, tap-mode readings) are stored only on your iPhone and your Apple Watch, in the app's private space. This data never leaves your devices: Dropp has no server, requires no account, and includes no analytics or advertising tools.
s1P2: Syncing between your iPhone and your Apple Watch happens exclusively over Apple's encrypted channel between your two paired devices (WatchConnectivity). No one else is involved.
s2Title: What we ask you not to enter
s2P1: The "Label" field identifies a place (Bay 3, Chair 5…). Never enter a patient's name or any information that could identify a person: the app is designed to work without any health or personal data.
s3P1: Alerts (end of infusion, progress) are local notifications, scheduled and triggered on your devices. They pass through no server.
s4P1: Dropp Pro subscriptions and the lifetime purchase are handled entirely by the App Store through your Apple Account. Dropp neither sees nor stores any payment or identity information — the app only receives confirmation from Apple that the purchase is active.
s5P1: Deleting the app deletes all of its data. You can also clear the history at any time from within the app. No copy exists anywhere else.
s6P1: If this policy evolves, the new version will be published at this address with its update date. The founding principle — no collection — will not change.
